Bash(cd C:/Users/Elio/mcs-platform && python3 << 'EOF'
import re

with open\('core/models.py', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Find all class definitions
classes = re.finditer\(r'^class\\s+\(\\w+\)\\\([^\)]*\\\):', content, re.MULTILINE\)

models = []
for match in classes:
    class_name = match.group\(1\)
    models.append\(class_name\)

for model in models:
    print\(model\)
EOF)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import zipfile, io, os

src = r'C:\\Users\\Elio\\el_spacing.docx'
modified_xml = r'C:\\Users\\Elio\\el_spacing_unpacked\\word\\document.xml'
out = r'C:\\Users\\Elio\\mcs-platform\\core\\management\\commands\\Engagement_Letter_TEMPLATE_BW_v3.docx'

with open\(modified_xml, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    new_xml = f.read\(\)

buf = io.BytesIO\(\)
with zipfile.ZipFile\(src, 'r'\) as zin:
    with zipfile.ZipFile\(buf, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED\) as zout:
        for item in zin.infolist\(\):
            if item.filename == 'word/document.xml':
                zout.writestr\(item, new_xml.encode\('utf-8'\)\)
            else:
                zout.writestr\(item, zin.read\(item.filename\)\)

with open\(out, 'wb'\) as f:
    f.write\(buf.getvalue\(\)\)
print\(f'Written: {out} \({os.path.getsize\(out\)} bytes\)'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python -c "
import re, zipfile

with zipfile.ZipFile\(r'C:\\Users\\Elio\\mcs-platform\\core\\management\\commands\\Engagement_Letter_TEMPLATE_BW_v3.docx', 'r'\) as z:
    xml = z.read\('word/document.xml'\).decode\('utf-8'\)

tags = re.findall\(r'\\{%-?\\s*\(.*?\)\\s*-?%\\}', xml\)

print\('=== ALL JINJA2 TAGS IN ORDER ==='\)
for i, tag in enumerate\(tags\):
    print\(f'{i+1:3}. {{% {tag} %}}'\)

print\(\)
depth = 0
for tag in tags:
    s = tag.strip\(\)
    if s.startswith\('for '\) or s.startswith\('tr for '\):
        depth += 1
    elif 'endfor' in s:
        depth -= 1
print\(f'FOR balance: {depth} \(should be 0\)'\)

depth = 0
for tag in tags:
    s = tag.strip\(\)
    if s.startswith\('if '\):
        depth += 1
    elif s == 'endif':
        depth -= 1
print\(f'IF balance: {depth} \(should be 0\)'\)
" 2>&1)
